description_long: This is a classic, elongated limousine with a soft pink exterior and a vintage, luxury design. The body features smooth, rounded contours, a prominent chrome grille at the front, and circular headlights with chrome accents. The windows are tinted dark, and the wheels are partially covered by fender skirts, adding to its elegant, retro appearance. Chrome trim runs along the sides, and the door handles are subtly integrated into the body. The rear of the vehicle is gently sloped, with a large trunk and classic tail lights. The overall look suggests a high-end, chauffeur-driven vehicle designed for comfort and style.
description: A vintage-style pink limousine with chrome accents, tinted windows, and a sleek, elongated body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent chrome grille, circular headlights, and the smooth, rounded hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, tinted windows, and fender skirts over the wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the sloped trunk, classic tail lights, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same window and door configuration with chrome trim.
